Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Bmw Of North Ameirca, Llc'S Responses To Written Discovery, Set One; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Michael Saeedian; Exhibits; [Proposed] Order.
Off Calendar May-08-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF HAOXUAN ZHU's Motion To Compel Defendant Bmw Of North Ameirca, Llc'S Responses To Written Discovery, Set One.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Sergo Aivazov, Esq., of THE LEMON PROS, LLP, (310) 430-7757, for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Not argued/contested. The matter is briefly discussed. At conclusion of discussion, the court adopts its tentative ruling. The unopposed motion is granted.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at jpdeol@dhillonlaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)
